title: The Miracle Begins
overview: A young man begins a new life at Amagami shrine, and meets the three sisters who live there.

title: String Cranes at Midday
overview: The sisters plot to drive Uryu away by making him do all the chores.

title: A Tryst with the Gods
overview: Uryu has marriage meetings with all three of the sisters.

title: The Amagami Shrine Festival ~Connections~
overview: The sisters are forced to get 5,000 people to come to their upcoming festival, or they'll have to sell the shrine.

title: The Amagami Shrine Festival ~Blossoming~
overview: Trouble strikes on the day of the festival! Will enough people come to save the shrine?

title: From Dawn till Dusk
overview: Uryu reflects on what happened after the shrine festival, and Asahi offers to help find the answer to his question.

title: Dream and Moon and Dream ~New Moon~
overview: The sisters seek help from the priestess who trained them, but are met with an unexpected demand.

title: Dream and Moon and Dream ~Half Moon~
overview: Yae wonders about her future, while Asahi thinks of moving away.

title: Dream and Moon and Dream ~Full Moon~
overview: The girls give Yomiko the answer, and Uryu promises to support their dreams.

title: Changing Clothes, Changing Hearts
overview: With spring break over, Uryu unexpectedly finds himself at the same school as Yuna.

title: The Real Reason for Staying Up Late ~Prelude~
overview: As the sisters and Uryu go out for a late-night trip, Uryu wonders about something strange he found...

title: The Real Reason for Staying Up Late ~Connections~
overview: The sisters, Makoto, and Uryu arrive at Inari Shrine, where Uryu has a strange experience.

title: The Real Reason for Staying Up Late ~Love~
overview: Uryu remembers how he first met Yae, and Yae makes a big decision.

title: The Scales That Hold Wishes ~Loop~
overview: Asahi is training for a marathon, but an unexpected rainstorm moves it to the day of a big festival at the shrine.

title: The Scales That Hold Wishes ~Going Back~
overview: After failing to escape from the time loop, Uryu is forced to consider what it is that Asahi really wants.

title: The Scales That Hold Wishes ~Going Forward~
overview: Asahi realizes what it is she really wants as the loop comes to an end.

title: The Send-Off Fires and the Vow With the Gods
overview: When Uryu's grades start to slip, the sisters make a decision.

title: Nadeshiko Hide-and-Seek ~Switch~
overview: Yuna and Uryu are forced to deal with a shocking occurrence.

title: Nadeshiko Hide-and-Seek ~Worry~
overview: While Yuna and Uryu get used to their new life, Yuna's best friend notices something is wrong.

title: Nadeshiko Hide-and-Seek ~Attraction~
overview: As the culture festival comes to a close, Yuna reflects on what really drives her.

title: Shirahi's Mirage ~Divergence~
overview: Shirahi is heartbroken when she sees the growing relationship between Uryu and the sisters.

title: Shirahi's Mirage ~Feelings~
overview: Uryu finds himself trapped in another world where he lives with Shirahi.

title: Shirahi's Mirage ~Ties~
overview: Uryu discovers the truth about what led him to this world.

title: Tying the Knot with an Amagami Sister
overview: Uryu and Shirahi make a choice about their future.
